title: The KdV conservative update preserves constant states

source.notes: Constant-state preservation for the KdV conservative update.

informal.statement: For a constant grid state, the KdV conservative update returns the same constant value at every grid index.
assumptions: scale, nonlinear, dispersion, and c are real numbers
i is a natural-number grid index
the KdV flux of a constant state has zero flux difference
informal.expected_conclusion: Constant states are preserved by the KdV conservative update.

declarations.name: kdvConservativeUpdate_const_state
declarations.statement: theorem kdvConservativeUpdate_const_state (scale nonlinear dispersion c : Real) (i : Nat) : kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion (fun _ => c) i = c

tasks.input: Translate constant-state preservation for the KdV conservative update into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem kdvConservativeUpdate_const_state (scale nonlinear dispersion c : Real) (i : Nat) : kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion (fun _ => c) i = c

tasks.input: Given the KdV conservative update and flux definitions, complete the constant-state proof.
tasks.target: A proof by unfolding kdvConservativeUpdate, conservativeUpdate, fluxDifference, kdvConservativeFlux, and secondForwardDifference, then using ring.
